ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text that documents the module (up to 2000 characters) */,
  "dbms" TEXT /* Type of database management system (DBMS) considered by developers */,
  "is_user_provider" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the module provides users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., Active, Inactive, Under Maintenance) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the module belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_dbms FOREIGN KEY ("dbms") REFERENCES dbms_types ("dbms_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms_types" (
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS type */,
  "dbms_name" TEXT /* Name of the DBMS type (e.g., Oracle, SqlServer, All) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the DBMS type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the DBMS type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_providers" (
  "user_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user provider */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that provides users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_providers_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Developer, Tester) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sources" (
  "user_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user source */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that uses the user source */,
  "user_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user provider (module) that provides the user records */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sources_user_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_provider_id") REFERENCES user_providers ("user_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sources_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the module */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Read, Write, Execute) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_user_access_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
